briefdescription.para: This function resets the CFU block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCfupmc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes an CFU core.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using an CFU driver.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCfupmc instance.
is a reference to a structure containing information about a specific XCfupmc instance.

is the device base address in the virtual memory address space. The caller is responsible for keeping the address mapping from EffectiveAddr to the device physical base address unchanged once this function is invoked. Unexpected errors may occur if the address mapping changes after this function is called. If address translation is not used, pass in the physical address instead.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XCfupmc *InstancePtr, u32 Addr, u32 Mask, u32 Val)
memberdef.name: XCfupmc_MaskRegWrite

briefdescription.para: This function does CFI register write using MASK register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCfupmc instance.
Address of the register to be written
Mask of the bit field to be written

briefdescription.para: This function enables or disables the global signals.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCfupmc instance.
pass 0x1 to enable the global signals, 0x0 to disable the global signals.

briefdescription.para: This function inits the global events to needs to be done before loading the CFI data.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCfupmc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function checks and handles CFU errors.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCfupmc instance.
is a pointer to the XCfupmc instance.
is a pointer to the XCfupmc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function clears Ignore CFI ERROR mask in CFU_APB_CFU_CTL.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCfupmc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when bitstream transfer is aborted by user.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCfupmc instance.

briefdescription.para: This file which contains the code related to CFU block.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 kc 12/21/2017 Initial release 2.00 bsv 03/01/2019 Added error handling APIs 2.01 bsv 11/06/2019 XCfupmc_ClearCfuIsr API added 3.00 bsv 27/06/2020 Code clean up pre 01/16/2025 Fixed warning 4.2 ng 03/26/2026 Fixed doxygen warnings
